text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Left, right, left... Kita, your right foot!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Urgh! I feel like my legs are gonna cramp up!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Let's take a little break.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You taking the lead makes dancing a whole lot
easier... but I still don't know if I'm doing it right!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're doing fine. With a little more practice,
you'll be gliding across the dance floor.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Gliding?! Th-that doesn't really sound like me...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that was such a cute dance! ♪ Are you
practicing for the Ligne Droite?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Ballroom dancing is a little difficult
for me. With all the new students coming next
month, I wanted to dance real cool, like a good
upperclassman should.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Could you set the standard for us,
Fine? I want to learn by example!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Sure thing. All right, dance with me, Satono!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, but I was hoping I could just watch too!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Then, who else could I... Oh, Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Shakur, help me out! Satono and Kita are
preparing for the Droite, and—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Pass.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What?! But you didn't even let me finish.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I knew what it was the moment I heard "Droite." I
couldn't care less about that thing!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Please, won't you grant me the honor of
becoming your partner?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hah!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you let your guard down! ♪ Satono and
Kita want to see what a proper ballroom dance
looks like. Don't twirl me too aggressively.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Why'd you make it so confusing? I thought you
were gonna ask me to the real thing! Also...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Height-wise, shouldn't I be the one asking?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur, you're such a good lead!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I pay attention in class. Why would I waste
my time having to do extra work rehearsing?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so cool! They're gliding around so
elegantly!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They look effortless, not one flaw in their
footwork. We have to reach their level.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right! Break time's over, let's get
back to practice!
